name: Nikhoj
overview: When Mr. Farooq's family was having lunch on a holiday, something happened that changed their lives. A group of unknown persons entered the house in the identity of the police and took Farooq Ahmed away. The whole family and neighbors were shocked. After this incident, Mr. Farooq's daughter Safia started looking  for her missing father. Many years later, Safia and her younger brother Saif came across a fact that makes their of waiting questionable, that Safia-Saif never thought so.

trailers.title: Nikhoj | Official Trailer | Chorki Original Series | Mimi | Sporshia | Shamol | Basar
